script.title: David and Goliath ⚔️ | Bible Story for Kids

scenes.narration: Long ago in Israel, a young shepherd boy named David watched over his father's sheep. He was small, but his heart was full of trust in God.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of a cheerful young shepherd boy named David in a simple tunic, tending fluffy white sheep in a bright green meadow, warm golden sunlight, rolling hills in background, family-friendly biblical children's book style

scenes.narration: One day, a giant warrior named Goliath came from the enemy army. He was nine feet tall and shouted mean words at God's people every single day.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of a huge armored giant warrior Goliath standing on a hilltop shouting, towering over a valley, bright cheerful colors, not too scary, children's storybook art style, biblical setting

scenes.narration: The soldiers of Israel were very afraid. No one wanted to fight the giant. But when David heard the giant's words, he knew God would help him.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of Israelite soldiers looking worried in their camp, while young David stands tall and brave with a determined smile, warm colors, biblical tents in background, cheerful children's book style

scenes.narration: King Saul tried to give David heavy armor and a big sword. But David smiled and said, 'I don't need these. God is with me, and that is enough.'
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of a kind King Saul offering golden armor to a small smiling David, David gently shaking his head, warm tent interior with lanterns, cheerful biblical children's storybook style

scenes.narration: David walked down to a little stream and picked up five smooth stones. He placed them in his pouch and held tight to his simple shepherd's sling.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of young David kneeling by a sparkling blue stream, carefully choosing smooth round stones, bright sunshine, green grass, cheerful and peaceful biblical children's book style

scenes.narration: David walked bravely toward the giant. Goliath laughed and laughed. But David said, 'You come with a sword, but I come in the name of the Lord!'
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of small brave David walking confidently toward the huge laughing giant Goliath in a wide valley, bright blue sky, rolling hills, courageous pose, cheerful biblical children's book style

scenes.narration: David swung his sling round and round. One little stone flew through the air and struck Goliath. The giant fell down, and God's people were safe!
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of young David confidently swinging a sling above his head in a sunny valley, a small stone flying through bright air, hopeful and triumphant mood, cheerful biblical children's book style

scenes.narration: Everyone cheered for David, but David thanked God. This story reminds you that no problem is too big when you trust the God who loves you.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of David smiling and looking up to a bright warm sky with hands lifted in thanks, happy crowd of Israelites cheering in the background, golden sunshine, joyful and warm biblical children's book style
